## Meeting Purpose

[Follow-up discussion on GrowthX's AI-powered content creation services for Diffblue's potential engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/6fzPgzt8Z9ji6zbP3XLPbj7RfLPZNVSs?tab=summary&timestamp=26.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX uses an AI workflow S-code engine, combining AI-driven research with human expertise for high-quality content creation](https://fathom.video/share/6fzPgzt8Z9ji6zbP3XLPbj7RfLPZNVSs?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
  - [Diffblue is considering GrowthX's services as a "bet" to scale top-of-funnel content, with a decision expected by Monday](https://fathom.video/share/6fzPgzt8Z9ji6zbP3XLPbj7RfLPZNVSs?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)
  - [GrowthX emphasizes quality control through multiple editorial review steps and processing \~20M tokens per piece of content](https://fathom.video/share/6fzPgzt8Z9ji6zbP3XLPbj7RfLPZNVSs?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [The engagement would start with a calibration process to ensure content meets Diffblue's specific needs and standards](https://fathom.video/share/6fzPgzt8Z9ji6zbP3XLPbj7RfLPZNVSs?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Technical Approach

  - [Utilizes an AI workflow S-code engine for scalable, code-based content generation](https://fathom.video/share/6fzPgzt8Z9ji6zbP3XLPbj7RfLPZNVSs?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
  - [Processes include research, persona development, and jobs-to-be-done analysis](https://fathom.video/share/6fzPgzt8Z9ji6zbP3XLPbj7RfLPZNVSs?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
  - [Employs Temporal as a runtime layer for efficient workflow execution](https://fathom.video/share/6fzPgzt8Z9ji6zbP3XLPbj7RfLPZNVSs?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
  - [Combines AI-driven processes with human expertise (managing directors, editors, SEO strategists)](https://fathom.video/share/6fzPgzt8Z9ji6zbP3XLPbj7RfLPZNVSs?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### Content Quality and Authenticity

  - [GrowthX emphasizes human oversight and editing throughout the content creation process](https://fathom.video/share/6fzPgzt8Z9ji6zbP3XLPbj7RfLPZNVSs?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
  - [Multiple editorial review steps (\>12) for each piece of content](https://fathom.video/share/6fzPgzt8Z9ji6zbP3XLPbj7RfLPZNVSs?tab=summary&timestamp=1085.0)
  - [Processing of \~20M tokens per article for comprehensive research and quality](https://fathom.video/share/6fzPgzt8Z9ji6zbP3XLPbj7RfLPZNVSs?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Calibration process to align content with client's specific needs and voice](https://fathom.video/share/6fzPgzt8Z9ji6zbP3XLPbj7RfLPZNVSs?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)

### Team Expertise

  - [Managing directors with significant industry experience (e.g., TripAdvisor, G2.com, TechCrunch)](https://fathom.video/share/6fzPgzt8Z9ji6zbP3XLPbj7RfLPZNVSs?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [Chief Content Officer: Matthew, former editor-in-chief of TechCrunch for 10 years](https://fathom.video/share/6fzPgzt8Z9ji6zbP3XLPbj7RfLPZNVSs?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
  - [SEO strategists and production staff for comprehensive content development](https://fathom.video/share/6fzPgzt8Z9ji6zbP3XLPbj7RfLPZNVSs?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### Content Strategy and SEO Considerations

  - [Week 1 focuses on developing a comprehensive content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/6fzPgzt8Z9ji6zbP3XLPbj7RfLPZNVSs?tab=summary&timestamp=617.0)
  - [Recommendation to include publish dates, update dates, and author information](https://fathom.video/share/6fzPgzt8Z9ji6zbP3XLPbj7RfLPZNVSs?tab=summary&timestamp=716.0)
  - [Discussion on potential SEO impacts of publishing frequency and backlink acquisition](https://fathom.video/share/6fzPgzt8Z9ji6zbP3XLPbj7RfLPZNVSs?tab=summary&timestamp=770.0)
  - [Emphasis on long-term ROI, citing previous success with SecuredIntelligence.com and TechBeacon](https://fathom.video/share/6fzPgzt8Z9ji6zbP3XLPbj7RfLPZNVSs?tab=summary&timestamp=842.0)

### Measuring Success and Expectations

  - [Ömer (Diffblue) seeking clarity on KPIs and expected outcomes](https://fathom.video/share/6fzPgzt8Z9ji6zbP3XLPbj7RfLPZNVSs?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
  - [Marcel (GrowthX) shared past success metrics: $4M spend over 4 years led to 800K monthly visitors and 5K leads](https://fathom.video/share/6fzPgzt8Z9ji6zbP3XLPbj7RfLPZNVSs?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)
  - [Highlighted efficiency: $0.08 per guaranteed session compared to $10-$20 per click for ads](https://fathom.video/share/6fzPgzt8Z9ji6zbP3XLPbj7RfLPZNVSs?tab=summary&timestamp=928.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Ömer to meet with Diffblue CEO to discuss the potential engagement](https://fathom.video/share/6fzPgzt8Z9ji6zbP3XLPbj7RfLPZNVSs?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)
  - [Diffblue to provide a final decision to GrowthX by Monday](https://fathom.video/share/6fzPgzt8Z9ji6zbP3XLPbj7RfLPZNVSs?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)
  - [If approved, GrowthX to initiate the calibration process with Diffblue to ensure content alignment](https://fathom.video/share/6fzPgzt8Z9ji6zbP3XLPbj7RfLPZNVSs?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide more detailed expectations and KPIs for Diffblue's specific case](https://fathom.video/share/6fzPgzt8Z9ji6zbP3XLPbj7RfLPZNVSs?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)
